description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house built on a sloped terrain, featuring a predominantly white facade with contrasting black and brown horizontal accents. The structure has a flat roof with a small glass skylight or rooftop access visible at the center. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house is set into a landscaped plot with angular, geometric ground surfaces, suggesting integration with the surrounding environment. The main entryway is slightly recessed and accessible via a small platform or steps, with a minimalist design and no visible porch or columns. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of solid and transparent materials.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, white facade, and large asymmetrical windows, set on a sloped, landscaped plot with geometric ground surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, horizontal brown accents, and the entry platform integrated into the sloped terrain.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile, vertical window strips, and the house's integration with the angular landscape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional large windows, more pronounced brown horizontal bands, and the flat roof with a central skylight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing smaller windows, the continuation of the black vertical accent, and the sloped ground wrapping around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist recessed entry with a small platform, no porch or columns, and clean geometric lines
